'''鈭歠-k-d-g''' ('''kafakdegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unberth|unberth]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unberth|unberth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-k-d-g
|-
! Lemma
| kafakdegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifakdegoko|thifakdegoko]] || [[word:jifakdegoko|jifakdegoko]] || [[word:shifakdegoko|shifakdegoko]] || [[word:kifakdegoko|kifakdegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufakdegoko|thuthufakdegoko]] || [[word:jujufakdegoko|jujufakdegoko]] || [[word:shushufakdegoko|shushufakdegoko]] || [[word:kukufakdegoko|kukufakdegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fakdegoko|th忙fakdegoko]] || [[word:j忙fakdegoko|j忙fakdegoko]] || [[word:sh忙fakdegoko|sh忙fakdegoko]] || [[word:k忙fakdegoko|k忙fakdegoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
